title: Potion of Caring
description: Adds a new Potion that prevents hostility, and brings mobs closer together.
body:
# Potion of Caring
Adds a new Potion that prevents hostility, and brings mobs closer together.

---

- You can make a Potion of Caring by brewing poison or slowness potions with a rose bush.
- When an entity has the Caring effect, they start following the closest entity.
  - If they are hostile, they will stop attacking.
  - Players are prevented from attacking, but can still move normally.

![Splashing a pig with care.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HZkf0ydf/images/a16b33508b7941f44303125ab0cfeac565da8161.png)

---

This mod was inspired by the [Potion of Caring](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Potion_of_Caring) from [The Love and Hugs Update](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_15w14a).  
Created at [ModFest 26](https://modfest.net/26) (Animation, **Affection**, Academia), in under 3 hours.  


[![Made for ModFest 26](https://badger-api-staging.worldwidepixel.ca/cozy?gradientStart=a41c5f&gradientEnd=580c36&lineOne=Made%20for&lineTwo=ModFest%2026&colourOne=FFFFFF&colourTwo=fa96c8&iconUrl=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/5959f93d710deccb28fa8f3d805206bf0ad27a13/icon/svg/26/transparent.svg)](https://modfest.net/26)
